nodes.name: 欣里希·利希滕施泰因
nodes.summary: 欣里希·利希滕施泰因是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联18种鸟类，包括埃及夜鹰、裸頸鸛、黄嘴犀鸟等18种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Yellow-breasted pipit
nodes.summary: Yellow-breasted pipit（Yellow-breasted pipit，学名 Hemimacronyx chloris），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: Austin Roberts (zoologist)
nodes.summary: Austin Roberts (3 January 1883 – 5 May 1948) was a South African zoologist.

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 德拉肯斯山脉
nodes.summary: 德拉肯斯山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括胡兀鷲、Forest buzzard、Yellow-breasted pipit等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2021 |title=Hemimacronyx chloris |volume=2021 |article-number=e.T22718444A180132223 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2021-3.RLTS.T22718444A180132223.en |access-date=20 December 2025}} | genus = Hemimacronyx | parent_authority = Roberts, 1922 | species = chloris | authority = (Lichtenstein, MHC, 1842) | synonyms = Anthus chloris (protonym) }} The yellow-breasted pipit (Hemimacronyx chloris) is a species of bird in the pipit and wagtail family Motacillidae that is found in the Drakensberg region of South Africa

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Apart from habitat loss due to agriculture, overgrazing and incompatible fire regimes, the increasing of open-cast coal mines has also restricted the distribution of this species. Various other species of great conservation concern co-inhabit the grasslands that this pipit occurs in, including Botha's and Rudd's Lark
